HeroClaim: Custom Software Development & Web Solutions Built to Scale.
PortfolioIntro: High-performance custom websites, mobile apps, and enterprise backends engineered for speed and reliability.
IntakeStep2Sub: Provide details on what we will be building

IntakeStep4Sub: Help us match your project with the right tier
IntakeStep5Sub: Where should we send the proposal?
SuccessMsg: Request submitted successfully! Our team will contact you shortly.
Why1Desc: No nested agencies or intermediate bloat. You interact directly with architects and engineers executing your stack.
Why2Desc: We build code meant to last. Every function, database lookup, and UI layout is structured to stay maintainable for years.
Why3Desc: We embrace AI as a tool of the future, not for unverified 'vibe coding' slop. Every generated block is rigorously audited, tested, and integrated by senior engineers.
Why4Desc: Need legacy software optimized, urgent bugs fixed, or a new system update? We step in, audit the codebase, implement critical fixes, and deliver smooth software remediation services rapidly.
Skills1Desc: High-performance custom backends and secure server APIs. We construct scalable server architectures, build custom database models, and set up event brokers for reliable data flow without database-bloating frameworks.
Skills2Desc: Unified mobile applications for iOS and Android. Using modern cross-platform patterns, we deliver responsive mobile apps that run fast and maintain a consistent layout across all screen resolutions.
Skills3Desc: Custom website development, interactive web applications, and corporate portals. We design lightweight frontends optimized for fast loading speeds, clean usability, and search ranking visibility.
Skills4Desc: Custom automation scripts, payment processing integration, and secure cloud deployment pipelines. We set up containerized environments, host platforms, and configure hands-free releases.
SkillsBadgeDesc: We deliver systems engineered for longevity and effortless scaling. Every codebase is structured to ensure that future feature additions, integrations, and handovers remain fast and frictionless.
PortfolioHeadline: Order Custom Software Development or Legacy Code Fixes
PortfolioPitch: Looking to order a new custom website, build a cross-platform mobile app, add complex features, or request expert bug fixes? TIVRI is your dedicated development partner. We guarantee premium clean code, rigorous performance testing, and rapid delivery for early launch partners.
ContactSub: Ready to order a custom website, build a mobile app, add new features, integrate secure payments, or request fast bug fixes? Let us know about your project requirements using our interactive intake wizard.
DirectMsgTitle: Just want to drop us a quick line?
DirectMsgSub: Click here to message us about vacancies, general queries, or greetings.
AboutHeading: Software Development Built with Absolute Integrity.
FooterIntro: Resilient web systems, cross-platform apps, and custom backends built with clean architecture and rigorous testing.
SocialsWarning: We are new and haven't launched our socials yet — coming soon.
CraftedWith: Crafted with Go, HTMX, and Vanilla JS

LoginSecurityNote: Security notice: Login attempts are rate-limited. Lockouts are triggered after consecutive failures.
DeadlineStepHint: Help us understand your project schedule and priority requirements.
DeadlineStrictDesc: Select if you have a launch target
DeadlineLabel: Do you have a strict launch deadline?
DeadlineSpecPlaceholder: Specify target date or timeframe (e.g. End of Q3, or October 15th)...
DeadlinePriorityInfo: Note: Requesting priority processing ensures your project is first in our queue, which may incur an additional fee. If another client has requested priority for the same period, we will coordinate and notify you regarding exact start windows.
HighQueueWarning: We are currently experiencing a high volume of project requests. Initial start times may be longer than expected.
AdminHighQueueHint: Enable to display a high-queue warning alert to new clients during intake.

AdminMaintenanceHint: Restrict public access and show a 503 maintenance page.
MaintenanceText: We are currently conducting scheduled system maintenance. Please check back shortly.
MetaDescription: At TIVRI, we design and architect clean, maintainable web systems, mobile applications, and custom databases tailored to your business. Premium custom software development. Contact us to start your project.
PrivacyIntro: Your privacy is important to us. This document outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use TIVRI.
PrivacySection1Text: The primary data we collect is the information you explicitly provide when submitting contact or project intake forms. We also use Cloudflare Web Analytics to monitor website performance anonymously, provided you have consented to cookies.
PrivacySection2Text: We use your submitted data solely to respond to your inquiries and establish communication. Your data is stored securely and is never sold or shared with third parties.
PrivacySection3Text: We implement industry-standard database security and session protections (such as HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite cookie policies) to prevent unauthorized access.
PrivacySection4Text: We use strictly necessary cookies to save your preferences and Cloudflare Web Analytics to understand how visitors interact with the site without tracking personal data.
PrivacySection5Text: If you have questions about your data or this policy, please reach out to us at [email].
TermsIntro: By accessing TIVRI, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms.
TermsSection1Text: You agree to use our website and contact forms only for lawful inquiries. Spam, automated scraping, or malicious form inputs are strictly prohibited.
TermsSection2Text: All designs, layouts, content, and code featured on this site are the intellectual property of TIVRI. Unlicensed copying or redistribution is prohibited.
TermsSection3Text: We are committed to delivering clean, secure, and high-performance software systems. We perform comprehensive testing and continuous updates to ensure maximum reliability and uptime for our clients.
TermsSection4Text: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable local laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.
CookieBannerText: We use strictly necessary cookies to ensure the website works properly and anonymous analytics to improve your experience. Learn more in our
TermsSection5Text: By consenting to our cookie policy, you agree to the anonymous collection of usage data via Cloudflare Web Analytics to help us improve the platform.
NoLeadsFoundDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you are looking for.
NoMessagesFoundDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you are looking for.
TechBannerText: We've recently upgraded our asset compilation engine to Bun and optimized our stack (Go, HTMX, & Vanilla JS).
TechBannerBenefit1: Migrated asset compilation to Bun for sub-millisecond bundling.
TechBannerBenefit2: Optimized Docker build pipeline with Bun alpine caching.
TechBannerBenefit3: Vanilla JS gives finer control over DOM and animations.
TechBannerBenefit4: Better performance and cleaner separation of concerns.
Error404Desc: The page you are looking for does not exist, has been moved, or is temporarily unavailable.
PortfolioPreviewDefaultDesc: A brief description of your project will be displayed here, showcasing your work and achievements.
